task_completion.description: Agent modified the entrypoint scripts or Dockerfiles to fix the bugs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal commands (like sed, dos2unix) or an open text editor (nano, vim, VS Code) showing modifications to 'entrypoint.sh' or 'Dockerfile' within the ~/projects/acme-services/ subdirectories.

task_completion.description: Agent rebuilt the Docker images for the modified services.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing 'docker build -t acme-cache-warmer .' (and similar commands for the other 3 services) along with the Docker build output logs.

task_completion.description: All four containers were successfully started and remain running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the output of 'docker ps' with all four services (acme-cache-warmer, acme-event-processor, acme-report-generator, acme-static-server) listed with a status of 'Up'.

task_completion.description: Agent created the debugging report at the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the creation of the file, or an open text editor saving to '~/Desktop/debugging_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: The debugging report contains accurate root causes and fixes for the four services.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visible text in the debugging report mentioning specific technical details (e.g., CRLF/line endings, bash vs sh syntax, set -e/grep failures, and incorrect config file paths).

integrity.description: Agent genuinely interacted with the Docker daemon.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal shows authentic Docker build steps (e.g., 'Step 1/X', layer hashes) and real container IDs in 'docker ps' output, rather than just echoing text.

integrity.description: Agent actually ran the containers before writing the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the sequence of fixing, building, and running the containers prior to or alongside writing the final debugging report.

integrity.description: Agent actually modified the files rather than just writing a report about what to do.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of file editing tools (nano, vim, sed, etc.) being used on the specific files in ~/projects/acme-services/.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The four services have specific intentional bugs: 1) acme-cache-warmer uses Bash syntax in an Alpine container that only has /bin/sh. 2) acme-event-processor has CRLF (Windows) line endings in its entrypoint script. 3) acme-report-generator uses 'set -e' with a failing 'grep' command, causing immediate exit. 4) acme-static-server sources a config file from an incorrect path (/etc/nginx/conf.d/env.conf instead of /etc/nginx/env.conf). The final report must be at /home/ga/Desktop/debugging_report.txt.
